description: Fix remaining SDK adoption issues: Teams should use findLocalStorageEntry instead of raw localStorage iteration, Slack should use getPageGlobal instead of manual globalThis casts, and Craigslist should use fetchFromPage+httpStatusToToolError instead of raw fetch.

userStories.title: Migrate Teams to use findLocalStorageEntry for MSAL token discovery
userStories.description: Teams manually iterates localStorage with a for loop to find MSAL tokens by key pattern. Replace with SDK's findLocalStorageEntry.
acceptanceCriteria: The for loop at teams-api.ts:27-45 replaced with findLocalStorageEntry calls
All localStorage.length and localStorage.key(i) and localStorage.getItem(key) replaced with SDK utilities

userStories.title: Migrate Slack to use getPageGlobal for window.boot_data and window.TS
userStories.description: Slack accesses window.boot_data and window.TS via manual globalThis casts instead of using SDK's getPageGlobal.
acceptanceCriteria: All (globalThis as Record<string, unknown>).__whatever accesses for boot_data and TS globals replaced with getPageGlobal
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/slack/src/slack-api.ts

Context:
Slack has multiple manual globalThis accesses for reading Slack's page globals:
- `(globalThis as Record<string, unknown>).boot_data` for API tokens
- `(globalThis as Record<string, unknown>).TS` for team/user info

Replace with getPageGlobal:
- `getPageGlobal('boot_data') as BootData | undefined`
- `getPageGlobal('boot_data.api_token') as string | undefined`
- `getPageGlobal('TS.boot_data.api_token') as string | undefined`

Note: Slack's auth detection tries multiple sources (getAuthFromLocalStorage, getAuthFromBootData, getAuthFromPageScripts, getAuthFromLocalStorageScan). Only the getAuthFromBootData function and any other function that reads window.boot_data or window.TS needs to be updated.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change the auth detection priority or multi-source fallback logic
- Do NOT change getAuthFromLocalStorage or getAuthFromPageScripts or getAuthFromLocalStorageScan
- Do NOT change slackApi() or any tool files

userStories.title: Migrate Craigslist callApi to use fetchFromPage instead of raw fetch
userStories.description: Craigslist's callApi function uses raw fetch() with manual credentials, timeout, and HTTP error classification. Replace with fetchFromPage which handles all of this.
acceptanceCriteria: callApi uses fetchFromPage from SDK instead of raw fetch()
Manual credentials:'include' and AbortSignal.timeout(30_000) removed — fetchFromPage handles them
Manual HTTP status if/else chain removed — fetchFromPage uses httpStatusToToolError internally
The handleFetchError and handleResponseError blocks are removed
FormData bodies still work (fetchFromPage accepts any RequestInit body)
